## Task

Task ID: `S?-T?`

## Summary

<!-- What changed and why. One task, one PR. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Copy the task's acceptance criteria from the roadmap and check each one you met. -->
- [ ] AC 1
- [ ] AC 2

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm test` is green (integration tests ran, **0 skips**)
- [ ] Docs updated for anything this change makes false (no claim outruns the code)
- [ ] A changeset is included if a publishable package changed (or the `no-changeset` label applies)
- [ ] All commits are `Signed-off-by` (DCO) and use Conventional Commit + task ID
- [ ] No secrets added to the repo
